messages.content: How can I build a castle?
Can you tell me what you’ve got in mind?
We've got the basics planned out. How many fireplaces should the castle have? Where would a suitable location to build it be?
Do you have any specific ideas for the location?  Do you want to build it in a forest, on a hill, in the middle of a town, etc?
